summary.archival_abstract: Official lore titled “Game Modes | Star Atlas.” This record preserves what Star Atlas / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text:
Game Modes | Star Atlas
0001.
Game Modes
Star Atlas delivers diverse gameplay experiences designed for different playstyles. From intense PvP combat arenas to cooperative PvE missions, the game offers something for combat enthusiasts, strategists, and explorers alike.
Your browser does not support the video tag.
5+
Game Modes
PvP
& PvE
Solo
& Co-op
Ranked
& Casual
Arena Combat
Test your piloting skills in dedicated combat arenas. The X5 Arena features dedicated servers for smooth, competitive ship-to-ship battles.
Dedicated server infrastructure
Ranked matchmaking
Multiple arena layouts
Ship class balancing
Racing Circuits
Push your ships to their limits on high-speed racing tracks through asteroid fields and space stations.
Time trials
Head-to-head racing
Ship customization for speed
Leaderboard competitions
PvE Encounters
Face AI-controlled enemies in dogfights and missions. Complete bounties, defend convoys, and take on escalating challenges.
Bounty hunting missions
Convoy defense
Boss encounters
Cooperative multiplayer
Open World
Roam freely through the Galia Expanse. The open-world mode combines exploration, combat, mining, and trading.
Seamless world
Dynamic events
Player-driven encounters
Persistent universe
Choose Your Battle
Whether you prefer structured arena combat or the freedom of open-world exploration, Star Atlas has a mode for you.
Play Now
